description.ko: 첨단 기술과 거친 지하 세계가 만나는 밀집된 사이버펑크 도시의 숨막히는 전경. V-디스트릭트의 중심에서 뿜어져 나오는 영롱한 네온 불빛이 도시를 밝힙니다.
description.en: A breathtaking view of a dense cyberpunk city where advanced technology meets the gritty underground, illuminated by the perpetual glow of the V-District's neon heart.

prompt: A sprawling cyberpunk metropolis at night, high-tech skyscrapers with glowing blue and magenta neon signs, rain-slicked asphalt reflecting vibrant lights, flying transit vehicles weaving through smog-filled alleyways, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed futuristic architecture, NEON-V aesthetic, 8k resolution.
